description: Registry of glTF scene and prop assets available for Chronos 3-D historical scenes.

assets.name: Abandoned Mansion Bedroom
assets.notes: Dilapidated bedroom with peeling wallpaper, broken furniture, and dusty atmosphere. Suitable for mystery or horror-themed historical vignettes.

assets.name: Armor Set
assets.notes: Standing suit of plate armor. Place on a ground plane or pedestal prop. Material type: metal.

assets.name: British Pub
assets.notes: Full pub interior with bar counter, stools, shelving with bottles. Good for Victorian-era or early 20th-century social scenes.

assets.name: Furniture Pack (FPS Creator Classic)
assets.notes: Generic furniture collection. Contains tables, chairs, cabinets, and shelves. May need to be split into individual props for scene placement.

assets.name: Game-Ready Colt Python Revolver
assets.notes: Detailed revolver model. Place on a table surface or in a character's hand position. Material type: metal. Unsuitable for pre-1955 scenes.

assets.name: Garden Table
assets.notes: Outdoor garden table. Works well with outdoor or courtyard scenes. Material type: wood or metal depending on variant.

assets.name: Human Models Set (Male/Female Rigged)
assets.notes: Rigged human models for character animation. Can supplement the archetype-based character system. Verify skeleton compatibility with existing animation_hint system.

assets.name: Knight (3D Print Model)
assets.notes: Detailed knight figure. Can serve as a decorative prop or static NPC stand-in. Material type: metal. Check polygon count — 3D print models may be very high-poly and need decimation.

assets.name: Medieval Tavern
assets.notes: Full tavern interior with wooden beams, tables, benches, and a bar area. Ideal for medieval-era scenes involving social gatherings or clandestine meetings.

assets.name: Old Bar
assets.notes: Vintage bar interior with counter, stools, and shelving. Covers a broader time range than the British Pub. Good for prohibition-era or early 20th-century scenes.

assets.name: Old Town
assets.notes: Outdoor town street scene with buildings, cobblestones, and market-area structures. Large asset — may need clipping or selective loading for bounded-room constraint.

assets.name: Restaurant in the Evening
assets.notes: Evening-lit restaurant interior with tables, chairs, and warm lighting baked into textures. Pre-baked lighting may conflict with dynamic scene lights — adjust envMapIntensity.

assets.name: Ruins of Hore Abbey
assets.notes: Open-air abbey ruins with crumbling stone walls and arches. Ideal for medieval ecclesiastical scenes. Large-scale outdoor asset — may exceed the 20 m room bounds.

assets.name: Stylized Medieval Castle Room
assets.notes: Stylized (non-photorealistic) castle room. Art style may clash with PBR materials on other props — consider adjusting envMapIntensity or using a custom shader.

assets.name: Table and Chairs (Low Poly)
assets.notes: Low-poly table and chairs set. Excellent performance profile. Good general-purpose furniture for any indoor scene. Material type: wood.
